## What's changed

- Fixed the UsageDeck icon not appearing on the About card in installed and portable builds.
- Added release validation so future packages fail rather than silently omit the About-card icon.

This is a beta release. Stable-channel installations will ignore it, while Beta-channel installations can update normally in place; no migration or reinstall is required.

**Full changelog:** [v0.4.0-beta.1...v0.4.0-beta.2](https://github.com/CallMeLewis/UsageDeck/compare/v0.4.0-beta.1...v0.4.0-beta.2)
